title: Bossbar Config
description: A basic bossbar config that allows you to resize and change the position of the bossbar in Minecraft.
body:
### BossBar Config

A simple client-side mod that lets you resize and reposition the boss bar HUD to wherever you want on your screen.

---

**Features**
- Scale the boss bar up or down (0.1x to 3.0x)
- Move it around using X & Y offsets
- Mod Menu config screen
- Commands for quick changes without opening the menu

---

**Commands**
- `/bossbar scale <0.1–3.0>` — resize the boss bar
- `/bossbar offset <x> <y>` — reposition it (negative x = left, positive x = right)
- `/bossbar reset` — restore defaults

---

**Requirements**
- [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) *(optional, for the config screen)*

---

**Client-side only** — safe to use on any server.
